title: Is anyone interested in a simple customer onboarding app?
excerpt:

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I’m exploring an idea for a customer onboarding app and would love your thoughts.

The idea is to make onboarding smoother by:

  • Letting you send a link to your customers with everything they need to get started — like required tools, key contacts, Slack setup, etc. (Instead of relying on messy email threads)
  • Allowing you to track each step in the app and directly in your Monday CRM timeline
  • Letting you build and manage onboarding flows using Monday CRM items, so everything stays within Monday and is easy to update

I’m just trying to see if something like this would be helpful to others. Would love to hear if this sounds useful, or if you’ve tried to solve this in another way.

Thanks so much!

posts.author: Ryan247Zook (Ryan247Zook)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
This customer onboarding app idea, centered around sending a single link with resources and tracking progress directly within Monday CRM, sounds very helpful, especially for Monday.com users. It addresses the pain point of messy email threads and offers benefits like centralized information, seamless CRM integration, and improved customer experience. While considering customization, integration with other tools, and the customer perspective is important, this Monday.com-focused approach could be a more integrated and potentially cost-effective solution compared to generic shared documents or dedicated onboarding platforms.

posts.author: kelvin93 (kelvin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Centralized onboarding: Avoids scattered docs/emails/slides. Sending one link is way more professional.
Progress tracking: Managers can easily see where customers are in the onboarding journey. HumanToCat Translator
Native integration: Keeping it inside Monday means less context switching and better adoption from internal teams.
Custom flows per customer: Makes scaling easier while still feeling personal.

posts.author: mosinjack (mosin jack)
posts.cookedHtml: Keeping onboarding centralized in Monday CRM is a smart move. Would love to see features like templates or file uploads — could be super helpful!
